name: Factorial Calculator
desc: Factorial Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
seo_description: Use our free factorial calculator to quickly estimate result based on n. Not registration needed.

range_hints.n: Valid: 0-170; Common: 1-20 for combinatorics; 170 is JS max before Infinity

result_context: The result ({result}) is n! = n × (n-1) × (n-2) ×... × 2 × 1, representing the number of ways to arrange n distinct items.
mistakes: Entering values above 170 causing JavaScript Infinity
